---
name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability (see SECURITY.md for responsible disclosure)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: security
---

⚠️ **For critical vulnerabilities, please email security@xmrtdao.org instead of opening a public issue.**

## Description
A clear description of the security concern.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical — immediate risk to data/systems
- [ ] High — significant risk
- [ ] Medium — moderate risk
- [ ] Low — minor concern

## Affected Components
Which parts of the project are affected?

## Suggested Fix
If you have a suggested remediation.
